name: number-converter
title: Number converter
description: Convert numbers across binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal formats
author: asd2003ru

commands.name: convert-from-binary
commands.title: Convert from Binary
commands.subtitle: Input binary and convert to octal/decimal/hex
commands.description: Convert binary values and copy results

commands.name: convert-from-octal
commands.title: Convert from Octal
commands.subtitle: Input octal and convert to binary/decimal/hex
commands.description: Convert octal values and copy results

commands.name: convert-from-decimal
commands.title: Convert from Decimal
commands.subtitle: Input decimal and convert to binary/octal/hex
commands.description: Convert decimal values and copy results

commands.name: convert-from-hex
commands.title: Convert from Hex
commands.subtitle: Input hexadecimal and convert to binary/octal/decimal
commands.description: Convert hexadecimal values and copy results
